title: Who are the people I've mentioned across multiple projects?
html:
Question

"Who are the people I've mentioned across multiple projects?"

Synthesized answer

A scan of the entity backlinks against the project/era boundaries (OSU era → China chapter → BroMenu/Brotein → Rankett, plus the parallel "personal life" track) surfaces a small set of people who keep showing up across more than one of those buckets. These are Yahir's load-bearing relationships — the ones he can't compartmentalize.

Person Appears across Notes
Dad Every era. Cited in 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream ("Impulse decision will kill you — dad"), in 2024 05 13 things (calling him during OSU finals), in 2025 05 30 todos ("call dad"), and in 2025 09 23 how im scraping by ("good grace of my dad", "ask my dad embarrassingly for an advance"). The recurring backstop.
Mom Every era. Goal in 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream ("Buy my mom a house"), logistics ("bolts for mom") in 2025 05 30 todos, grace in 2025 09 23 how im scraping by. The motivational frame and the safety net.
Maya OSU + Austin eras. Recurring "call maya" in 2025 05 30 todos; also surfaces in the 2022 "why" list ("get maya to Mexico"). Frequent enough to be on the weekly call rotation.
David OSU + Austin. Recurring "call david about life" in 2025 05 30 todos; gift-sending in 2022. The friend who survives geography.
Valeria OSU + China + family bucket. Yahir bought her a return plane ticket (2024 05 13 things) and her graduation is on the 2022 ledger. Likely sister; lives across the family + travel domains.
Zane OSU bureaucracy + Rankett-era gratitude debt. Contact at The Ford Family Foundation in 2024 05 13 things; the institution shows up again on the gratitude list. The conduit to the scholarship that made the OSU → Austin pipeline possible.
Kyle + Ayden OSU era only — but linked across multiple notes (2024 05 13 things for rent transfers and room decisions). The Corvallis housing pair.
Cuva OSU → Austin transition. Roommate Yahir is chasing for rent in 2025 05 30 todos. Bridges the geographical move.
Brenda Aguilera Childhood/Grants Pass + 2022 goals + gratitude list. Named in 2022 07 18 why ("make Jann and Brenda proud") and on the 2025 gratitude list. One of the few people Yahir explicitly says he is trying to make proud.
Chan Taylor Gratitude list, no other surfaced era. Worth flagging — the only mentor named individually outside family.

A second-tier group appears across exactly two project contexts:

  • Mei Dong + Quin — both showed up only in the OSU/study-abroad bureaucratic layer (2024 05 13 things); they bridge OSU and the China chapter via visa logistics.
  • Yoav — appears only in the India travel layer but is the named travel companion across 2024 08 14 travel occurrences.
  • Charlie + Stepheven — both surface as fragmentary names at the bottom of 2026 01 13 rankett com ("Yo Charlie. Imma be out of town for" and just "Stepheven"). Currently orphans — flagged for backlink if they recur in Rankett-era ingests.

The pattern: Yahir's cross-project people cluster heavily on family + Grants Pass benefactors + a handful of OSU-era friends who survived the move. The Rankett era has so far surfaced almost no new named relationships in the wiki — which is itself a finding. Either Rankett is a solo bunker, or there's a layer of Austin-era people not yet ingested.

Sources

  • 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream · 2022 07 18 why
  • 2024 05 13 things · 2024 08 14 travel occurrences · 2024 12 21 todos
  • 2025 04 20 people i am indebted to for helping me · 2025 05 30 todos · 2025 09 23 how im scraping by
  • 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide · 2026 01 13 rankett com
  • yahir family · debt of gratitude · gratitude list
  • Entities: david · maya · valeria · kyle · ayden · cuva · zane · quin · mei dong · brenda aguilera · chan taylor · yoav
